prose:
**Furan frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`), spin-restricted Kohn–Sham in PySCF (no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (no DFT optimization). SCF converged in 9 cycles; no warnings reported. HOMO = −6.3597638 eV, LUMO = −0.1024036 eV → gap = **6.2573602 eV**.  

Command:  
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplxhi4wz1/live.json`  
Output JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplxhi4wz1/live.json`  
Live log is being written to `frontier_<timestamp>.out` in the current working directory (tail -f to follow).
